House of the Dragon

Main Characters

Rhaenyra Targaryen

Emma D'Arcy / Milly Alcock

Blacks

The firstborn daughter of King Viserys I and his named heir to the Iron Throne. A dragonrider of pure Valyrian blood, she leads the 'Blacks' in the civil war — fighting for her right to rule in a realm that refuses to accept a queen.

Daemon Targaryen

Matt Smith

Blacks

Younger brother to King Viserys and former heir to the throne. A peerless warrior and dragonrider, Daemon is volatile, dangerous, and magnetic — eventually becoming Rhaenyra's husband and most powerful ally.

Alicent Hightower

Olivia Cooke / Emily Carey

Greens

Daughter of Otto Hightower and Queen of Westeros through her marriage to Viserys. Once Rhaenyra's closest friend, she becomes her fiercest rival — convinced her sons have a rightful claim to the throne.

King Viserys I

Paddy Considine

Neutral

A warm, kind, and decent man chosen by the lords of Westeros to succeed the Old King. He names Rhaenyra his heir but his inability to manage court politics sets the stage for devastating civil war.

King Aegon II

Tom Glynn-Carney

Greens

The eldest son of Viserys and Alicent, crowned by his mother's faction upon the king's death. A flawed and reluctant king who leads the 'Greens' against Rhaenyra's claim to the throne.

Prince Aemond

Ewan Mitchell

Greens

Alicent's second son — a fearsome, one-eyed warrior and rider of Vhagar, the largest living dragon. Cold and calculating, he is far more formidable than his elder brother and drives much of the war's violence.

Princess Rhaenys

Eve Best

Blacks

'The Queen Who Never Was' — passed over as heir simply for being a woman. A dragonrider and wife of Lord Corlys Velaryon, she becomes a wise and steely supporter of Rhaenyra's cause.

Lord Corlys Velaryon

Steve Toussaint

Blacks

'The Sea Snake' — the most famed nautical adventurer in Westeros. Lord of House Velaryon, richer than the Lannisters and commanding the world's largest navy, a crucial military and political ally of Rhaenyra.

Ser Criston Cole

Fabien Frankel

Greens

A common-born knight of Dornish descent with no land or title — only his honor and his extraordinary skill with a sword. He begins as Rhaenyra's sworn protector but becomes one of her most dangerous enemies.

Otto Hightower

Rhys Ifans

Greens

Hand of the King and father of Alicent. Viserys' most trusted advisor, he is the chief architect of the plot to put Aegon II on the throne — scheming and cunning, rarely letting loyalty get in the way of ambition.
